productName: Dabstar Dab Stix Pre-Roll 1g - Donkey Butter (I)
description: This infused indica pre-roll wraps Donkey Butter flower around a concentrate boost (think kief, hash, distillate, or diamonds) for a louder aroma and a longer session. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — with notes of butter, pepper, and earthy, with a slow, mellow wind-down vibe. A little goes a long way.
